title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The company's success is due to its innovative marketing strategy.
I didn't have enough money, so I couldn't buy the tickets.
questions.beforeGap: If I had had enough money, I

questions.firstSentence: He never suspected that his friends were planning a surprise party.
questions.afterGap: that his friends were planning a surprise party.

questions.firstSentence: It is said that the bridge was built in the 17th century.
I'd prefer you to stay at home tonight.
He was so exhausted that he fell asleep in the meeting.
questions.afterGap: that he fell asleep in the meeting.
